body:
Simple addition of reduction functions when dim labels are `x`, `y`. Tests corresponding to new functions are included. 
	modified:   src/OutputVar.jl
	modified:   test/OutputVar.jl
title: Simply extend reduction functions to box dim labels

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `CairoMakie` package from `0.9, 0.10, 0.11` to `0.9, 0.10, 0.11, 0.12`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for CairoMakie in [weakdeps] to 0.12, (keep existing compat)
